description: Style Note mumbai slang sets cosmo street trends with their printed kurtas. Those interested in colour blocking can wear this with bright contrasting capris or pants. Others who want to keep their look classic and chic can pair this with tonal leggings, and embellished sandals. Product Details Mustard printed kurta, has a spread collar with no top button, full buttoned placket, short sleeves with a decorative mid arm buttoned tab, two patch pockets on the chest with decorative buttoned tabs and belt loops with a sash around the waist Material and Care 100% cotton Wash using a mild detergent Do not bleach Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular Fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M Style NoteMumbai Slang sets cosmo street trends with their printed kurtas.
